Award Interpretation Rulebook
Hospitality Industry (General) Award 2020
MA000009
SECTION 01
Classifications
Code
Level
Stream / role
Indicative duties & training
Schedule
INT
Introductory
All streams
Entry level on starting; induction and basic on-the-job training. Progresses to Level 1 after 3 months (or sooner if competent).
Sch A.1
L2-SEC
Level 2
Security
Security officer / door person — controlling entry, monitoring patrons (check cross-award MA000016).
Sch A (L2)
L3-FB3
Level 3
Food & beverage
Food & beverage attendant grade 3 — cocktails, cellar/keg work, supervising grade 1–2; Certificate III pathway.
Sch A (L3)
L4-SUP
Level 4
Supervisory
Food & beverage supervisor / attendant grade 4 — supervising and training staff; trade or equivalent.
Sch A (L4)
Refs:

$25.85
L3
Level 3
$1,014.70
$26.70
L4
Level 4
$1,068.40
$28.12

+25% loading

SECTION 04
Penalty Rates
Day / type
FT/PT %
FT/PT $ (L3)
Casual %
Casual $ (L3)
Notes
Saturday
125%
$33.38
150%
$40.05
Sunday
150%
$40.05
175%
$46.73
Public holiday
225%
$60.08
250%
$66.75
Min engagement applies
Minimum engagement
—
casual 2 hrs
PT min 3 hrs; PH min per cl. 35

SECTION 05
Evening & Night
Window
Additional loading
Days
Notes
7:00pm – midnight
+$2.81 per hour
Mon–Fri
Added to ordinary/casual hourly rate
Midnight – 7:00am
+$4.22 per hour
Mon–Fri
Added to ordinary/casual hourly rate
Saturday / Sunday / public holiday
Not applied
Sat–Sun, PH
Weekend/PH penalty rates already cover these hours (no stacking)
Refs:
SECTION 06
Overtime
Trigger / rate
Threshold or multiplier
Notes
Daily trigger (FT/PT)
More than 11.5 ordinary hrs/day
Hours beyond the daily ordinary maximum are overtime
Weekly trigger
More than 38 hrs/week
Averaged over the roster cycle where applicable
Casual daily trigger
More than 12 hrs/day
Casual overtime applies beyond 12 hours in a day
Overtime — first 2 hours
150%
Monday to Saturday
Overtime — after 2 hours
200%
Monday to Saturday
Overtime — Sunday
200%
All overtime worked on a Sunday
Overtime — public holiday
250%
All overtime worked on a public holiday
Refs:
SECTION 07
Allowances
Allowance
Amount
Basis
Clause
Meal allowance (overtime)
$16.73
per occasion
cl. 26 / Sch C
Tool allowance (cooks/apprentice cooks)
$2.03 per day, max $9.94 per week
per day / week
cl. 26 / Sch C
Working supervisor (in charge) — airport catering
$0.56–$1.46 per hour by team size (5 / 10 / 20 / 20+)
per hour
cl. 26 / Sch C
Travel / vehicle
Vehicle (managerial, hotels) $0.99/km; airport-catering travel $8.45/day
per km / day
cl. 26 / Sch C
SECTION 08
